mdRecord.dcterms:title: The Eagle 1962
mdRecord.dcterms:description: A yearbook called The Eagle 1962 celebrates the school year with a collection of photographs and stories about the faculty, staff, and students of Willis High School, Willis, Virginia. The yearbook includes Senior Student statistics. The theme of the yearbook is "From Alpha to Omega" (from beginning to end)
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: School yearbooks
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
